module.fishing.description:
### Tips
* Select Analyst as the fishing character, otherwise automation will not work correctly.
* Configure the cast key, number of fishing attempts, and lure type in the bottom-right game UI before starting.
* Exotic fishing spots are limited to 25 attempts per day; Rare spots 50 per day; Normal spots have no limit.
* After finishing one fishing spot, manually move to the next spot before restarting the script.
* If reel-in errors occur and logs report more than two yellow blocks, recalibrate the HSV color. When the fishing ring appears, click `Calibrate Color`, then click the yellow zone.
module.fishing.log.init_automation_faile: Automation initialization failed: unable to open color calibration
module.fishing.log.未识别出按键文字_请手动设置_e: Key text not recognized, please manually set {e}

module.fishing.log.钓鱼佬永不空军: A true angler never returns empty-handed!
module.fishing.log.钓鱼按键识别最佳匹配为_best_matc: Best key match detected for fishing action: {best_match}
module.fishing.log.鱼跑了_空军: The fish got away! Empty catch!
module.fishing.title: Fishing
module.fishing.ui.请点击图像上的黄色完美收杆区域_提取颜色: Click the yellow Perfect Reel-In zone in the image (extract color)
